shot_type_and_framing: medium shot, the rectangular marble slab centered with slight perspective showing all four golden spherical legs visible within the frame
camera_movement: slow push-in towards the slab to emphasize texture and material contrast
lens_and_cinematic_look: full-frame feel, 50mm lens style with shallow depth of field softly blurring the white background while keeping the slab sharply in focus
environment_description: minimalist white seamless background with soft shadows under the slab
subject_description: rectangular white marble slab with subtle beige veining, supported on four shiny golden spherical legs
motion_behavior: natural physics, the slab remains stable with no motion, focus on impeccable material details
